_comment: Phase 10 — all on-screen text for the 3D scenes. Plain language only. No jargon. Every label must pass the 'random visitor understands it in 3 seconds' test. Change these freely; code reads at runtime.

philosophies.conventional: IF WE KEEP FARMING THE WAY WE DO NOW
philosophies.rewild: IF WE LET NATURE TAKE IT BACK

attract_loop.intro: Three futures. Same patch of ground. Fifty years.
attract_loop.outro: TOUCH A COLUMN TO SEE WHY

scene_b.title_template: THIS IS WHAT {philosophy_verb} DOES TO THE GROUND IN {years} YEARS

scene_c_healthy.title: THE GROUND IS ALIVE
scene_c_healthy.fact: INSIDE ONE TEASPOON OF HEALTHY SOIL LIVES MORE LIFE THAN PEOPLE ON EARTH
